# ADR NNNN: {Short title of the decision}

## Status

{Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded by ADR-XXXX} — YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

What is the issue we're deciding on? What constraints, forces, or background
matter? Write this so a reader joining the project later can understand the
decision without hunting through other docs.

## Decision

What did we choose, stated plainly. Include alternatives considered if they
weren't obvious dead ends.

## Consequences

What becomes easier, harder, or different because of this decision. Be honest
about downsides — future you will thank present you.
